name: Southwestern Barley Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup prepared hot or medium salsa
1 red and green bell peppers, diced
15 1/2 ounces red kidney beans, canned, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook barley in a medium saucepan according to package directions.
2. Mix salsa, tomato juice, vinegar, lime juice, and black pepper in a small bowl.
3. Toss together cooked barley, corn, peppers, scallions, beans, and cilantro in a large bowl.
4. Add dressing and toss to coat. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese and serve with tortilla chips. Serves 4.
QUICK SWITCH: Out of barley? Try kamut. In a medium pan, bring 4 cups water, 1 1/3 cups kamut, and 1/2 teaspoon salt to a boil. Cover; simmer for 1 hour until puffed and tender. Makes 3 cups.
